items.description: INTRODUCING THEE SHERIFF

evidence.text: INTRODUCING THEE SHERIFF: A BLEND OF CLASSIC TOMATO AND VEGAN MOZZARELLA, PAIRED WITH GRILLED ONION AND TOFU. BANANA PEPPERS ADD A TANGY TWIST, TOPPED OFF WITH A SMOKY BBQ DRIZZLE. IT’S A BOLD, PLANT-BASED SHOWDOWN OF FLAVORS.

items.sourceSummary: INTRODUCING THEE SHERIFF: A BLEND OF CLASSIC TOMATO AND VEGAN MOZZARELLA, PAIRED WITH GRILLED ONION AND TOFU. BANANA PEPPERS ADD A TANGY TWIST, TOPPED OFF WITH A SMOKY BBQ DRIZZLE. IT’S A BOLD, PLANT-BASED SHOWDOWN OF FLAVORS.

evidence.text: TOMATO SAUCE ON THE SIDE

items.name: VEGAN KNOTS
items.description: Welcome our Vegan Knots: an aromatic base of garlic puree is coupled with melty NUMU vegan mozzarella. It’s complemented by the hearty notes of ABBOT’S Plant-Based Italian “Sausage” and sweet grilled onions. ‘The Blend’ adds a flavorful layer, enhanced by an additional drizzle of garlic puree. Served with a side of classic tomato dipping sauce, our Vegan Knots offer an enticing, animal-free feast packed with satisfying flavors.

items.name: WHITE PIE
items.description: Indulge in our White Pie, featuring a rich parm-romano sauce and perfectly melted shredded mozzarella. This simple yet decadent combination delivers a creamy, cheesy delight that’s perfect for those who appreciate the finer things in pizza.
